---
title: "Transcriptomics Pipeline — Complete Report"
params:
  run_id: "run_001"
  design_formula: "~condition"
  norm_counts_path: ""
  deg_results_path: ""
  pca_plot_path: ""
  volcano_plot_path: ""
  ma_plot_path: ""
  heatmap_path: ""
  correlation_path: ""
  go_path: ""
  kegg_path: ""
  gsea_path: ""
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: darkly
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

## Executive Summary

```{r summary}
if (file.exists(params$deg_results_path)) {
  deg <- read.csv(params$deg_results_path)
  n_sig <- sum(deg$padj < 0.05 & abs(deg$log2FoldChange) > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_up <- sum(deg$padj < 0.05 & deg$log2FoldChange > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_down <- sum(deg$padj < 0.05 & deg$log2FoldChange < -1, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("**Run:** %s  \n", params$run_id))
  cat(sprintf("**Design:** `%s`  \n", params$design_formula))
  cat(sprintf("**Total DEG (padj < 0.05, |log2FC| > 1):** %d  \n", n_sig))
  cat(sprintf("  - Upregulated: %d  \n", n_up))
  cat(sprintf("  - Downregulated: %d  \n", n_down))
}
```

## Differential Expression Results

```{r deg_table}
if (file.exists(params$deg_results_path)) {
  deg <- read.csv(params$deg_results_path)
  datatable(deg, options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE))
}
```

## Quality Control

### Sample Correlation

```{r correlation}
if (file.exists(params$correlation_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$correlation_path)
}
```

### Gene Coverage

```{r coverage}
if (file.exists("gene_coverage.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("gene_coverage.png")
}
if (file.exists("pca_variance.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("pca_variance.png")
}
if (file.exists("batch_pca.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("batch_pca.png")
}
```

## PCA Plot

```{r pca}
if (file.exists(params$pca_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$pca_plot_path)
}
```

## Volcano Plot

```{r volcano}
if (file.exists(params$volcano_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$volcano_plot_path)
}
```

## MA Plot

```{r ma}
if (file.exists(params$ma_plot_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$ma_plot_path)
}
```

## Heatmap (Top DE Genes)

```{r heatmap}
if (file.exists(params$heatmap_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$heatmap_path)
}
```

## Functional Enrichment

### GO Enrichment

```{r go_plot}
if (file.exists(params$go_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$go_path)
}
```

```{r go_table}
go_file <- sub("go_dotplot.png", "go_enrichment.tsv", params$go_path)
if (file.exists(go_file)) {
  go <- read.delim(go_file)
  datatable(go, options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE))
}
```

### KEGG Pathways

```{r kegg_plot}
if (file.exists(params$kegg_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$kegg_path)
}
```

```{r kegg_table}
kegg_file <- sub("kegg_dotplot.png", "kegg_enrichment.tsv", params$kegg_path)
if (file.exists(kegg_file)) {
  kegg <- read.delim(kegg_file)
  datatable(kegg, options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE))
}
```

### GSEA (Hallmark)

```{r gsea_plot}
if (file.exists(params$gsea_path)) {
  knitr::include_graphics(params$gsea_path)
}
```

```{r gsea_table}
if (file.exists("gsea_results.tsv")) {
  gsea <- read.delim("gsea_results.tsv")
  datatable(gsea, options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE))
}
```

## Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
